title: Udhwa Lake Bird Sanctuary: Jharkhand’s Hidden Paradise for Migratory Birds
excerpt: Discover Jharkhand’s only bird sanctuary, known for migratory birds, twin lakes, Ramsar recognition, and peaceful wetland beauty.
author: Sarfaraj

title: Jami Masjid Rajmahal: A Grand Mughal-Era Monument in Jharkhand
excerpt: Explore the historic Jami Masjid of Rajmahal, a remarkable Mughal-era monument built by Raja Man Singh in the 16th century.
author: Sarfaraj

title: Why I Built Udhwa.in
excerpt: The story behind building Udhwa.in, a digital platform created to give local identity, visibility, and opportunity to Udhwa.
author: Sarfaraj
